28 February 2026 Military News

Operations
Defense Policy / Programs
Defense Industry
Other Conflicts
News Reports

Current Operations

    Operation Epic Fury / Operation Roaring Lion | Operation True Promise 4

  • U.S. Forces Launch Operation Epic Fury CENTCOM 28 Feb 2026 -- U.S. Central Command (CENTCOM) commenced Operation Epic Fury, Feb. 28, at the direction of the President of the United States.
  • Trump Says 'Major Combat Operation' Launched Against Iran, Tehran Fires Back Across Middle East RFE/RL 28 Feb 2026 -- US President Donald Trump said Washington had begun "major combat operations" against Iran, hours after Israel announced it had carried out what it described as a "preemptive strike" on February 28.
  • Trump says U.S. military undertakes "massive and ongoing operation" in Iran People's Daily 28 Feb 2026 -- U.S. President Donald Trump said early Saturday morning the U.S. forces are carrying out a "massive and ongoing" attack on Iran to "destroy their missiles and raze their missile industry to the ground."
  • US Launches Major Combat Operations in Iran - Trump Sputnik 28 Feb 2026 -- The United States has launched major combat operations in Iran short time ago, President Donald Trump said on Saturday.

  • US Says Iran Rejected Nuclear Offer Before Preemptive Strikes RFE/RL 28 Feb 2026 -- The United States said on February 28 that it launched preemptive military strikes against Iran after concluding that Tehran was preparing to use its missile arsenal against US forces and allies and had no intention of agreeing to meaningful limits on its nuclear program.
  • U.S. authorizes departure of non-essential embassy staff from Israel over safety risks People's Daily 28 Feb 2026 -- The U.S. State Department has authorized the departure of non-emergency U.S. government personnel and their families from Israel due to safety concerns, the U.S. Embassy in Israel said Friday.
  • Trump's Endgame In Iran: Strategic Submission Or Systemic Collapse? RFE/RL 28 Feb 2026 -- Weeks of tension with Iran and a rapid US military buildup have erupted into joint US-Israeli strikes on high-profile targets, including Iranian military sites and the residences of the country's top brass.
  • Marc Thiessen: 'The Ground Forces Are The Iranian People' RFE/RL 28 Feb 2026 -- A prominent US political commentator and RFE/RL board member says the latest American strikes on Iran mark the beginning of a sustained campaign aimed not just at military deterrence but at ending the rule of the Islamic republic as it currently exists.

  • Iran Targeting Mideast Countries That Host US Bases RFE/RL 28 Feb 2026 -- Iranian missiles have been launched at several countries in the Middle East, all of which host bases of US armed forces, triggering air raid sirens across the region.
  • Iran's retaliatory attack completely destroys sophisticated US radar system in Qatar Press TV 28 Feb 2026 -- The Islamic Revolution Guards Corps (IRGC) has announced that it destroyed a sophisticated American radar system stationed in Qatar as part of its retaliatory attacks targeting US bases and assets in the region.
  • IRGC Navy pounds US MST ship with a volley of missiles after Israeli-US aggression Press TV 28 Feb 2026 -- As part of its retaliatory operations against the latest Israeli-American aggression on the Islamic Republic of Iran, the Islamic Revolution Guards Corps (IRGC) launched a volley of missiles on Saturday at a US Maritime Strike Tomahawk (MST) support vessel.
  • Iran's retaliatory attacks will continue uninterruptedly: Senior commander Press TV 28 Feb 2026 -- The commander of Iran's Khatam al-Anbiya Central Headquarters has vowed that the Islamic Republic's retaliatory operation against US and Israeli interests in the region will continue without any pause.
  • True Promise 4: IRGC launches new waves of missiles at Israeli, American targets Press TV 28 Feb 2026 -- The Islamic Revolution Guards Corps (IRGC) launched the third, fourth and fifth waves of its retaliatory military operation late on Saturday by launching a barrage of missiles at the Israeli-occupied territories.
  • IRGC launches missile, drone strikes against Israel in response to US-Israeli aggression Press TV 28 Feb 2026 -- The Islamic Revolution Guards Corps (IRGC) has announced the launch of a massive wave of missile and drone strikes against targets inside the Israeli-occupied territories, after Israel and the US initiated military assault against Iran.
  • IRGC pounds US bases across West Asia following US, Israeli aggression Press TV 28 Feb 2026 -- The Islamic Revolution Guards Corps (IRGC) has carried out a string of simultaneous and massive missile strikes against US military bases across West Asia in retaliation for airstrikes targeting several cities in Iran, including the capital Tehran.

  • Iranian Foreign Minister on Situation in State Amid Strikes: Iran Dealing With Situation Sputnik 28 Feb 2026 -- Iran is dealing with the situation, Iranian Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi said on Saturday, commenting on the current escalation in the region.
  • US-Israeli aggression violates UN Charter; Iran will defend homeland: Foreign Ministry Press TV 28 Feb 2026 -- Iran's Ministry of Foreign Affairs has condemned the United States and the Israeli regime's act of military aggression against Iranian territory as a violation of the nation's sovereignty and the United Nations Charter.
  • US-Israeli 'regime change' project in Iran 'impossible mission': FM Araghchi Press TV 28 Feb 2026 -- Iran's Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi said on Saturday that "regime change" in the Islamic Republic of Iran is an "impossible mission."
  • Iran Plunged Into Digital Darkness As Internet Blocked Amid US, Israeli Air Strikes RFE/RL 28 Feb 2026 -- Iran has been plunged into a "near-total" Internet blackout as the United States and Israel carry out a massive, coordinated aerial bombing campaign across the country.

  • Statement by Prime Minister Netanyahu Israel - Prime Minister 28 Feb 2026 -- "My brothers and sisters, citizens of Israel, a short while ago, Israel and the United States embarked on an operation to remove the existential threat posed by the terrorist regime in Iran."
  • Statement by Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu Israel - Prime Minister 28 Feb 2026 -- "This morning, Israel and the United States launched a combined operation to remove the existential threat posed to Israel by the regime of the Ayatollahs in Iran."

  • Risch Statement on Strikes on Iran US Senate Foreign Relations Committee 28 Feb 2026 -- U.S. Senator Jim Risch (R-Idaho), chairman of the Senate Foreign Relations Committee, today released the statement below regarding President Trump's recent strikes on Iran.
  • Rogers Statement on U.S. Military Strikes in Iran House Armed Services Committee 28 Feb 2026 -- House Armed Services Committee Chairman Mike Rogers (R-AL) released the following statement regarding U.S. strikes in Iran:
  • Chairman Mast on Iran Strikes U.S. House of Representatives Committee on Foreign Affairs 28 Feb 2026 -- Today, House Foreign Affairs Committee Chairman Brian Mast issued the following statement on the strikes on Iran.
  • Chairman Crawford Statement on U.S. Military Operations Against the Iranian Regime US House of Representatives Permanent Select Committee on Intelligence 28 Feb 2026 -- House Permanent Select Committee on Intelligence Chairman Rick Crawford (AR-01) released the following statement on President Trump's announcement of U.S. military operations against the Iranian Regime in Operation Epic Fury.
  • Ranking Member Shaheen Statement on President Trump's Attack on Iran US Senate Foreign Relations Committee 28 Feb 2026 -- Today, U.S. Senator Jeanne Shaheen (D-NH), Ranking Member of the Senate Foreign Relations Committee, issued a statement on the United States' preemptive attack on Iran:
  • Smith Statement on Trump Administration Employing Military Force Against Iran House Armed Services Committee - Democrats 28 Feb 2026 -- U.S. Representative Adam Smith (D-Wash.), Ranking Member of the House Armed Services Committee, released the following statement in response to the Trump Administration employing U.S. military force against Iran.
  • Duckworth Statement on Trump's Illegal Attack on Iran Senator Tammy Duckworth (D-IL) 28 Feb 2026 -- U.S. Senator Tammy Duckworth (D-IL) today issued the following statement after Donald Trump launched an illegal military campaign against Iran without Constitutionally-required authorization from the democratically-elected Congresspeople who represent both the troops whose lives Trump is risking and the American people who he may be forcing to fund yet another forever war in the Middle East
  • Kelly Statement on Military Operation Against Iran Office of Mark Kelly (D-AZ) 28 Feb 2026 -- Today, Arizona Senator and Navy Combat Veteran Mark Kelly released the following statement on the U.S. military operation against Iran:
  • Statement of Sen. Warner on Military Action in Iran Office of Senator Mark R. Warner (D-VA) 28 Feb2026 -- U.S. Sen. Mark Warner (D-VA), Vice Chairman of the Senate Select Committee on Intelligence, issued the following statement on President Donald Trump's announcement of wide-ranging military strikes inside Iran
  • Ocasio-Cortez Statement on Trump's Combat Operations in Iran Representative Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez (NY-14) 28 Feb 2026 -- Today, Representative Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez (NY-14) released the following statement after the Trump Administration's announcement of the beginning of a massive U.S. military operation in Iran.
  • LEADER JEFFRIES ON NPR: "THE WAR POWERS RESOLUTION WOULD REQUIRE IMMEDIATE TERMINATION OF ANY ADDITIONAL MILITARY ACTION" Congressman Hakeem Jeffries 28 Feb 2026 -- Today, House Democratic Leader Hakeem Jeffries appeared on NPR's Morning Edition, where he made clear that Donald Trump launched massive and ongoing military operations against Iran without the authorization of Congress, and Democrats remain committed to compelling a vote on a War Powers Resolution when Congress returns.

  • Iran strikes 'squandered a chance for diplomacy': Guterres UN News 28 Feb 2026 -- "Everything must be done" to prevent wider escalation of war across the Middle East following joint US-Israeli strikes against Iran, and retaliatory action from Tehran targeting multiple countries in the region, the UN Secretary-General told the Security Council on Saturday.
  • Bombing of Iran and retaliatory strikes 'a grave threat to international peace and security': Guterres UN News 28 Feb 2026 -- "Everything must be done" to prevent wider escalation of war across the Middle East following joint US-Israeli strikes against Iran, and retaliatory action from Tehran targeting multiple countries in the region, the UN Secretary-General told the Security Council on Saturday.
  • Attacks on Iran and retaliatory strikes 'undermine international peace and security' UN News 28 Feb 2026 -- UN Secretary-General António Guterres and the heads of UN agencies have condemned Saturday's joint Israeli and US attacks on Iran and the Iranian retaliatory strikes on Israel and the Gulf Regions.
  • UNICEF statement on the impact of the military escalation on children in the Middle East UNICEF 28 Feb 2026
  • Türk deplores strikes against Iran, and retaliation OHCHR 28 Feb 2026
  • Statement by the Secretary-General on Iran UN Secretary-General 28 Feb 2026
  • Secretary-General's remarks to the Security Council meeting on the situation in the Middle East [as delivered] UN Secretary-General 28 Feb 2026

  • Israel closes airspace to civilian flights following attacks on Iran People's Daily 28 Feb 2026 -- Israel closed its airspace to civilian flights on Saturday following a joint Israeli-U.S. attack on Iran, according to local authorities.

  • The G7 Foreign Ministers' Telephone Meeting Ministry of Foreign Affairs of Japan 28 Feb 2026
  • Joint E3 Leaders' Statement on Iran: 28 February 2026 Gov.UK 28 Feb 2026
  • We strongly condemn Iranian strikes across the region: UK statement at the UN Security Council UK FCDO 28 Feb 2026 -- Statement by Ambassador James Kariuki, UK Chargé d'Affaires to the UN, at the UN Security Council meeting on The Middle East.
  • PM statement on Iran: 28 February 2026 Gov.UK 28 Feb 2026
  • Statement on Iran Prime Minister of Australia 28 Feb 2026
  • Statement by Prime Minister Carney and Minister Anand on the situation in the Middle East Prime Minister of Canada 28 Feb 2026
  • Joint Statement by President Costa and President von der Leyen on developments in Iran EC/CEU 28 Feb 2026
  • Foreign Ministry Spokesperson's Remarks on the Military Strikes Against Iran by the U.S. and Israel PRC MofA 28 Feb 2026
  • China calls for immediate halt to military operations to avoid further escalation of tensions, Chinese FM on US, Israel strikes on Iran Global Times 28 Feb 2026 -- A Chinese Foreign Ministry spokesperson said on Saturday that China is highly concerned about the military attacks by the US and Israel on Iran. Iran's national sovereignty, security and territorial integrity should be respected. China calls for an immediate halt to military operations, to avoid further escalation of tensions, to resume dialogue and negotiation, and to maintain peace and stability in the Middle East, the spokesperson said.
  • Putin Discusses Developments Around Iran With Security Council Members - Kremlin Sputnik 28 Feb 2026 -- Russian President Vladimir Putin held a videoconference meeting with permanent members of the country's Security Council to discuss the situation around Iran, Kremlin spokesman Dmitry Peskov said on Saturday.
  • Press release on Foreign Minister Sergey Lavrov's telephone conversation with Minister of Foreign Affairs of the Islamic Republic of Iran Abbas Araghchi Russia Ministry of Foreign Affairs 28 Feb 2026
  • Statement by the Russian Foreign Ministry regarding military aggression of the United States and Israel against Iran Russia Ministry of Foreign Affairs 28 Feb 2026
  • The situation in the Middle East Ministry of Foreign Affairs of Japan 28 Feb 2026
  • Situation in Iran (Statement by Foreign Minister MOTEGI Toshimitsu) Ministry of Foreign Affairs of Japan 28 Feb 2026
  • Statement from Prime Minister Jonas Gahr Støre about the situation in the Middle East Government of Norway 28 Feb 2026
  • About situation in the Middle East Latvia MFA 28 Feb 2026
  • Statement of the Minister of Foreign Affairs of Lithuania Kęstutis Budrys on the situation in the Middle East Lithuania MFA 28 Feb 2026
  • Comment by Foreign Minister Margus Tsahkna on the hostilities in the Middle East Estonia MFA 28 Feb 2026
  • Slovenia is following with concern reports of the Israeli-U.S. strike on Iran Republic of Slovenia 28 Feb 2026
  • Comment of the MFA on the operation against the Iranian regime Ministry of Foreign Affairs of Ukraine 28 Feb 2026
  • Statement by the Ministry of Foreign Affairs of the Republic of Cuba Cuba Ministry of Foreign Affairs 28 Feb2026 -- Cuba calls for an end to the new aggression by the United States and Israel against Iran and avoid an escalation in the Middle East.
  • HE GCCSG Condemns in the Strongest Terms the Blatant and Nefarious Iranian Targeting of the Territories of the UAE, Bahrain, Qatar, Kuwait, and Jordan Gulf Cooperation Council 28 Feb2026 -- His Excellency Mr Jasem Mohamed Albudaiwi, Secretary General of the Gulf Cooperation Council (GCC), expressed the GCC's condemnation in the strongest possible terms of the nefarious and blatant Iranian missile attacks on the territories of the United Arab Emirates (UAE), the Kingdom of Bahrain, the State of Qatar, the State of Kuwait, and the brotherly Hashemite Kingdom of Jordan.
  • Aboul Gheit condemns Iranian assaults and attacks on civilian facilities in Arab states League of Arab States 28 Feb 2026
  • League of Arab States condemns Iranian attacks on Arab States League of Arab States 28 Feb 2026
  • OIC General Secretariat expresses its condemnation of Iran's targeting of member states with ballistic missiles Organization of Islamic Cooperation (OIC) 28 Feb 2026 -- The General Secretariat of the Organisation of Islamic Cooperation (OIC) expresses its strong condemnation and denunciation of Iran's targeting of the sovereignty and territories of neighbouring Member States, the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia, the United Arab Emirates, the Kingdom of Bahrain, the State of Qatar, the State of Kuwait and the Hashemite Kingdom of Jordan, in an unacceptable escalation and a threat to the stability of the entire region, which carries serious repercussions on regional peace and security
  • Persian Gulf States Comment on US-Israel Strikes on Iran Sputnik 28 Feb 2026 -- Israeli army has initiated a strike against Iran "to remove threats against the State of Israel", the nation's Defense Minister Israel Katz announced, adding a special and immediate state of emergency has been declared across the country.
  • Press Release Pakistan Ministry of Foreign Affairs 28 Feb 2026 -- Pakistan regrets the breakdown of talks and outbreak of hostilities in the Middle East. Pakistan condemns the unwarranted attacks against the Islamic Republic of Iran. These attacks come at a time when diplomatic efforts were underway to reach a peaceful and negotiated solution. Such a course of action will undermine the peace and stability of the entire region, with far reaching consequences.
  • No: 38, 28 February 2026, Regarding the Recent Developments in Our Region Republic of Turkey Ministry of Foreign Affairs 28 Feb 2026
  • "All actors must take urgent action to spare our region from greater suffering" Presidency of The Republic of Turkey 28 Feb 2026 -- Speaking at an iftar dinner with the AK Party's Istanbul Provincial Organization, President Erdoğan said: "All actors, especially the Islamic world, must take urgent action to prevent the war from escalating further, to prevent more bloodshed, and to spare our region from greater suffering. As Türkiye, we have been doing and will continue to do whatever is required of us to resolve the issues peacefully, just as we have done from the very beginning."
  • Press release on Foreign Minister Sergey Lavrov's telephone conversation with Prime Minister and Minister of Foreign Affairs of the State of Qatar Mohammed Al Thani Russia Ministry of Foreign Affairs 28 Feb 2026
  • Here follows a statement by the Royal Office: Morocco Ministry of Foreign Affairs 28 Feb 2026
  • The Kingdom of Morocco condemns in the strongest terms the abject Iranian missile attack that violated the integrity and security of brotherly Arab states, namely the State of the United Arab Emirates, the Kingdom of Bahrain, the State of Qatar, the State of Kuwait, the Hashemite Kingdom of Jordan and the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia. Morocco Ministry of Foreign Affairs 28 Feb 2026
  • HRH the Crown Prince, King of Morocco Condemn Iranian Attacks SPA 28 Feb 2026 -- His Royal Highness Prince Mohammed bin Salman bin Abdulaziz Al Saud, Crown Prince and Prime Minister, received a phone call today from King Mohammed VI of Morocco, during which they discussed the latest developments in light of the military escalation in the region, as well as the blatant Iranian attacks against Saudi Arabia and other brotherly nations
  • Foreign Minister, Pakistani Counterpart Condemn Iranian Attacks SPA 28 Feb 2026 -- Minister of Foreign Affairs Prince Faisal bin Farhan bin Abdullah received a phone call today from Deputy Prime Minister and Minister for Foreign Affairs of the Islamic Republic of Pakistan Mohammad Ishaq Dar, during which they discussed developments in the region
  • HRH the Crown Prince Receives Call from Egyptian President Reaffirming Joint Stance Against Regional Threats SPA 28 Feb 2026 -- His Royal Highness Prince Mohammed bin Salman bin Abdulaziz Al Saud, Crown Prince and Prime Minister, received a phone call today from President of the Arab Republic of Egypt Abdel Fattah El-Sisi, during which they discussed serious developments in the region and the repercussions of the ongoing escalation on its security and stability
  • HRH the Crown Prince, Pakistani Prime Minister Discuss Regional Security; Pakistan Affirms Backing for the Kingdom SPA 28 Feb 2026 -- His Royal Highness Prince Mohammed bin Salman bin Abdulaziz Al Saud, Crown Prince and Prime Minister, received a phone call today from Prime Minister of the Islamic Republic of Pakistan Muhammad Shehbaz Sharif, during which they discussed serious developments in the region and the repercussions of the ongoing escalation on regional security and stability
  • HRH the Crown Prince Condemns Iranian Attacks, Discusses Regional Security with French President SPA 28 Feb 2026 -- His Royal Highness Prince Mohammed bin Salman bin Abdulaziz Al Saud, Crown Prince and Prime Minister, received a phone call today from French President Emmanuel Macron, during which the two leaders discussed the serious developments in the region and the repercussions of the ongoing escalation on regional security and stability
  • Saudi Arabia Strongly Condemns Failed and Cowardly Iranian Attacks Targeting Riyadh and Eastern Regions SPA 28 Feb 2026 -- The Kingdom of Saudi Arabia expressed its strongest rejection and condemnation of the blatant and cowardly Iranian attacks targeting Riyadh and Eastern regions, all of which were repelled
  • HRH Crown Prince Affirms Full Solidarity with UAE, Bahrain, Qatar, Kuwait, Jordan in Phone Calls with Leaders SPA 28 Feb 2026 -- His Royal Highness Prince Mohammed bin Salman bin Abdulaziz Al Saud, Crown Prince and Prime Minister, made phone calls today to United Arab Emirates President Sheikh Mohamed bin Zayed Al Nahyan, Bahrain King Hamad bin Isa Al Khalifa, State of Qatar Amir Sheikh Tamim bin Hamad Al Thani, State of Kuwait Amir Sheikh Meshal Al-Ahmad Al-Jaber Al-Sabah, and Jordan King Abdullah II bin Al Hussein
  • Saudi Arabia Strongly Condemns Iranian Attack Against United Arab Emirates, Bahrain, Qatar, Kuwait, and Jordan SPA 28 Feb 2026 -- The Kingdom of Saudi Arabia condemned and denounced in the strongest terms the blatant Iranian aggression and the flagrant violation of the sovereignty of the United Arab Emirates, the Kingdom of Bahrain, the State of Qatar, the State of Kuwait, and the Hashemite Kingdom of Jordan
  • Taiwan closely monitoring situation after U.S., Israel strike Iran: Lai CNA 28 Feb 2026 -- President Lai Ching-te (賴清德) said Saturday he has instructed the government to closely monitor regional developments following strikes by the United States and Israel on Iran, and to take all necessary precautionary measures.
  • It Is Fair to Give the Iranian People a Chance to Rid Themselves of a Terrorist Regime and to Guarantee Security for All Nations That Have Suffered From Terror Originating in Iran - Address by the President President of Ukraine 28 Feb 2026

Defense Policy / Programs

  • The President Met with the New Minister of Defense and Minister of Foreign Affairs of the Netherlands President of Ukraine 28 Feb 2026
  • Prime Minister gains new insight into use of drones and emerging technologies in Ukraine Government of Norway 28 Feb 2026 -- Drones are playing a key role in the war in Ukraine, and the Government is planning to provide more than NOK 12 billion in support to Ukraine in 2026 for the procurement of drones and autonomous systems.
  • Ukraine seeks the Netherlands' backing to expand the Drone Line initiative Ukraine MOD 28 Feb 2026

  • Regular Press Briefing of the Ministry of National Defense on February28, 2026 PRC MND 28 Feb 2026
  • US the greatest source of uncertainty for international nuclear order: Defense Spokesperson PRC MND 28 Feb 2026 -- "China strictly honors the commitment to a moratorium on nuclear testing, and has never conducted any activities in violation of the Comprehensive Nuclear-Test-Ban Treaty (CTBT)," said a Chinese defense spokesperson at a press briefing on Friday.

  • Israel MOD and IDF Complete Reception and Unloading of a Cargo Ship Israel MOD 28 Feb 2026 -- As part of the full support for the IDF's operational needs, the Israel Ministry of Defense (IMOD) and the IDF completed the reception and unloading of a cargo ship over the weekend, carrying tons of military equipment, including military gear, dozens of Humvees, trucks, and more.
  • Israel MOD Director General, Maj. Gen. (Res.) Amir Baram Convened a Situational Assessment With Senior Ministry Leadership and Operational Agencies Israel MOD 28 Feb 2026 -- The Director General outlined the ministry's top priorities: sustaining the IDF's operational endurance and ensuring the continuity of function across the defense establishment; continued support for reserve mobilization; advancing home front preparedness; and maintaining defense industries and essential infrastructure.

Defense Industry

Other Conflicts


    Ukraine Conflict News

    Other Conflicts

  • Afghanistan Air Force Strikes Pakistani Military Targets - Defense Ministry Sputnik 28 Feb 2026 -- The Afghan Air Force launched a new series of strikes on military targets in Pakistan on Saturday night, the Afghan Defense Ministry said.
  • Statement by the High Representative on behalf of the EU on the escalation between Afghanistan and Pakistan EC/CEU 28 Feb 2026
  • Casualties rise as Pakistan-Afghanistan clashes continue People's Daily 28 Feb 2026 -- Pakistan's military said on Friday that 274 Afghan militants were killed and more than 400 were injured in cross-border clashes since Thursday.

News Reports

  • Explainer: Understanding common prosperity through China's new five-year blueprint People's Daily 28 Feb 2026 -- Over the past months, widening income gaps and strains on social security in some of the world's most developed capitalist countries have become a heated topic of discussion in China and beyond.
  • China to accelerate lunar mission plans this year People's Daily 28 Feb 2026 -- China is advancing toward its goal of sending a manned mission to the moon by around 2030, with the pace of construction of major related infrastructure set to accelerate this year, the China Manned Space Agency said in a news release on Friday.

  • PLA activities in the waters and airspace around Taiwan ROC MND 28 Feb 2026
  • Resisting reunification by force is a dead end: Defense Spokesperson PRC MND 28 Feb 2026 -- "Lai Ching-te and his ilk, driven by partisan and personal interests, have recklessly squandered public funds to purchase US-made weapons. This will only drain Taiwan's coffers faster, push Taiwan closer to the peril of war, and drag the people in Taiwan down into an abyss," said Senior Colonel Zhang Xiaogang, spokesperson for China's Ministry of National Defense, at a regular press conference on Saturday.

  • Respected Comrade Kim Jong Un Gives Gifts to Major Leading Cadres KCNA 28 Feb 2026 -- Kim Jong Un , general secretary of the Workers' Party of Korea and president of the State Affairs of the Democratic People's Republic of Korea, on February 27 met with major leading cadres and military commanding officers at the headquarters building of the Party Central Committee and gave them gifts he specially prepared.
  • Respected Comrade Kim Jong Un Has Photo Session with Officers and Soldiers of Parade Units KCNA 28 Feb 2026 -- Kim Jong Un , general secretary of the Workers' Party of Korea and president of the State Affairs of the Democratic People's Republic of Korea, on Feb. 27 met the officers and soldiers of units of the Korean People's Army at all levels who fully demonstrated the absolute support of the DPRK armed forces and all the people for the WPK's fighting programme and their confidence in sure victory by showcasing their vigorous stride in the military parade commemorating the Ninth WPK Congress.

  • Iran Agreed to Abandon Enriched Uranium Stockpiles at US Demand - Omani Foreign Minister Sputnik 28 Feb 2026 -- During negotiations with the United States, Iran agreed to give up all its enriched uranium stockpiles, which is one of Washington's key demands for a deal, Omani Foreign Minister Badr al-Busaidi said.
  • Trump says U.S. faces "big decision" on Iran People's Daily 28 Feb 2026 -- The United States is facing "a big decision to make" on Iran, U.S. President Donald Trump said on Friday.
  • Explainer: What key signals emerged from the latest U.S.-Iran talks? People's Daily 28 Feb 2026 -- The United States and Iran concluded their third round of indirect talks here on Thursday, with the mediator, Oman, describing the talks as making "significant progress."
  • U.S. supercarrier off Israel casts shadow over Washington-Tehran diplomatic track People's Daily 28 Feb 2026 -- The U.S. Navy's largest aircraft carrier, the USS Gerald R. Ford, arrived off Israel's coast on Friday, raising concerns that Washington and Tehran may be moving closer to direct military confrontation.
  • Chinese embassy in Iran urges Chinese citizens in the country to closely monitor changes in security situation Global Times 28 Feb 2026 -- The Chinese embassy and consulates in Iran on Saturday reminded Chinese citizens in Iran to closely monitor changes in the security situation as the country faces significantly increase in external security risks recently.
  • European countries urge citizens to leave Mideast as U.S.-Iran tensions rise People's Daily 28 Feb 2026 -- More European countries on Friday urged their citizens to leave or avoid travel to Iran and several other Middle East regions due to escalating U.S.-Iran tensions.

  • PM call with the President of the UAE: 28 February 2026 Gov.UK 28 Feb 2026
  • PM call with the Amir of Qatar: 28 February 2026 Gov.UK 28 Feb 2026

  • Int'l community should resolutely oppose Japan's reckless moves towards neo-militarism: Defense Spokesperson PRC MND 28 Feb 2026 -- "The international community should remain highly vigilant and resolutely oppose Japan's reckless moves towards neo-militarism, and join hands in upholding the victorious outcome of World War II and the post-war international order," said Senior Colonel Zhang Xiaogang, spokesperson for China's Ministry of National Defense (MND), at a press briefing on Saturday.
